nodes.label: VoicePilot
nodes.rationale: A local-first voice-to-prompt assistant for Linux developers that preserves technical intent and privacy.

nodes.label: Offline And Privacy-First Operation
nodes.rationale: Audio and transcript data must remain local by default, with no telemetry or external model calls unless explicitly enabled.

nodes.label: Modular Replaceable Service Boundaries
nodes.rationale: ASR, VAD, cleanup, typing, storage, and UI should be isolated behind clear boundaries with replaceable provider adapters.

nodes.label: No Default Logging Of Audio Or Prompts
nodes.norm_label: no default logging of audio or prompts

nodes.label: Hybrid Local-First Architecture
nodes.rationale: The desktop shell, frontend, and inference layer are deliberately split across Rust, React, and Python while keeping user data local.
